_description: Thaumaton Torpedo cost-reduction test. Alice has Thaumaton Torpedo + Wedgelight Rammer (already stationed with 9 charge counters, so it's an artifact creature with flying/first strike) and 6 Plains. Sequence: (1) Move to combat, declare Wedgelight Rammer as attacker against Bob. (2) Continue through combat to postcombat main. (3) Activate Thaumaton Torpedo — because Alice attacked with a Spacecraft this turn, the activation cost is reduced from {6} to {3}. Pay {3} + {T} + sacrifice, target Glory Seeker; Glory Seeker is destroyed. Without the Spacecraft attack the cost would be {6}, so Alice would not have enough untapped lands.
